trousers.name: Brutalist Cargo Shorts
trousers.description: Heavy architectural cotton shorts with flat cargo pockets flushed to the side seams. Hidden button flies, zero outward hardware, and clean raw edges.

trousers.name: Pleated Walk Shorts
trousers.description: Crisp wide-leg pleated shorts crafted from visual structure drill twill. Sharp front creasing ensures an impeccably modern street presence.

trousers.name: Dual Chevron Athletic Shorts
trousers.description: Premium casual training shorts package containing a deep black pair and an off-white cream pair. Finished with a clean contrasting double-chevron logo at left hem.

trousers.name: Circular Patch Sweat Shorts
trousers.description: Ultra cozy sweat shorts crafted in delicate pastel cream-yellow heavy fleece cotton. Featuring a high contrast custom circular branding emblem on left hem.

trousers.name: High-Waisted Denim Shorts
trousers.description: Relaxed premium high-waisted denim shorts. Authentic wash with raw cuffed hems and traditional five-pocket hardware.
